title: Li Auto Earnings History and Forecasts
text: Li Auto's earnings history and forecasts on MarketBeat provide analyst estimates, historical actual results, and forward guidance. The platform tracks quarterly and annual earnings per share, revenue estimates, and revisions from multiple analyst sources. Historical earnings data shows Li Auto's journey from losses in 2022 to profitability in 2023, with net income of RMB 11.81 billion. 2024 saw net income of RMB 8.0 billion as margins compressed despite revenue growth of 16.6% year-over-year to RMB 144.46 billion. 2025 revenue declined 22.25% to RMB 112.31 billion as the company faced delivery challenges and competitive pressures. Forward earnings estimates show consensus expectations for recovery in 2026-2027 as new product launches and autonomous driving features drive uptake. Analyst price targets remain mixed, with an average target around $19.66 suggesting limited near-term upside from current levels. Earnings surprises have been mixed, with the company beating on revenue more often than on earnings per share, suggesting pricing pressure and margin challenges.
